prompt: Execute Phase A for new feature: Add OAuth2 social login support (GitHub + Google). No existing spec. Run A.1 → A.2 → A.3 in sequence.

assertions.name: executes_a1_spec_creation
assertions.description: Should invoke A.1 spec-drafter to create proposal.md

assertions.name: executes_a2_task_planning
assertions.description: Should invoke A.2 task-planner after spec creation

assertions.name: executes_a3_agent_allocation
assertions.description: Should invoke A.3 agent allocation as final step

assertions.name: sequential_step_order
assertions.description: Steps must execute in A.1 → A.2 → A.3 order
